recommendations.title: The Three Faces of Eve
recommendations.overview: A doctor treats a woman suffering from multiple personality disorder.

recommendations.title: 6 Souls
recommendations.overview: A female forensic psychiatrist discovers that all of one of her patient's multiple personalities are murder victims. She will have to find out what's happening before her time is finished.

recommendations.title: Frankie & Alice
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a go-go dancer with multiple personality disorder who struggles to remain her true self and begins working with a psychotherapist to uncover the mystery of the inner ghosts that haunt her.

recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.
